terminologyProfile.descriptionRule: Dimensions are metres and joint limits are radians in the declared right-handed asset frame; authored intent is not reference-image or solver evidence.

objectClass.notes: Authored benchmark brief with no external image reference.

reasoning: Four nested pivots, paired rails, springs, cables, and a bell head require stable local frames.
Tier reductions must preserve all semantic and construction-input identities.

specDepthDecision.rationale: Serial articulation and visible attachments require explicit hierarchy, action, material, and tier contracts.

definitionOfDone: A weighted base supports a readable four-axis serial arm and bell reflector with exposed warm bulb.
Action-ready mode exercises authored joint channels and exact reset restores seed-bounded rest transforms.
All tiers preserve every exported protected identity.

featureGroups.name: Weighted base and offset yaw chain
qualityCriteria: The base establishes support and the offset yaw post clearly starts the articulation chain.

featureGroups.name: Four-axis serial hinge hierarchy
qualityCriteria: Yaw, shoulder, elbow, and shade pivots retain local axes, limits, sockets, and readable hardware.

featureGroups.name: Paired arm, spring, and cable systems
qualityCriteria: Two rails per arm stage retain spacing while six decorative parent-local spring/cable sweeps publish 12 named endpoint sockets, overlap, and gap tolerances without claiming cross-joint mechanics.

featureGroups.name: Bell shade, reflector, and bulb
qualityCriteria: Paired exterior-enamel and underside-reflector crown annuli with rolled overlap, deliberately open lower aperture, inner reflector, rim, socket, stylized opaque bulb, and emitter socket form a coherent lamp head.

featureGroups.name: Diagnostic motion and physics boundary
qualityCriteria: Four deterministic absolute-time channels reset exactly and all collider/constraint records remain complete authoring inputs with solver authority false.

antiShallowSpecRules: Reject a single bent tube in place of serial pivots.
Reject floating links, springs, or cables.
Reject solver or visual-acceptance claims without evidence.

shadeBoundaryProxy.composition: eight tier-invariant capsule construction inputs intended for one adapter-side compound boundary body; the solid neck is deliberately excluded
shadeBoundaryProxy.evidenceStatus: source-tested-authoring-bound; canonical collision acceptance remains blocked

shadeNeckProxy.evidenceStatus: source-tested-authoring-bound; canonical collision acceptance remains blocked

physicsHandoff.bulbTriggerPurpose: proximity trigger only; no solid-contact authority

motionContract.resetContract: resetPose(), setTime(_, false), and leaving action-ready restore exact seed-specific rest angles

blockingRequirements: host scale/context version and registered frames

attachmentConstructionContract.geometryUpdate: static parent-local authored sweeps with explicit endpoint sockets

springSurfaceContactContract.wireRadiusSource: exact TubeGeometry.parameters.radius per authored sweep; no nominal-radius substitution
springSurfaceContactContract.endpointBoundaryPolicy: open TubeGeometry endpoint ring embedded in collar/front-washer volume

shadeTopologyContract.crown: paired FrontSide enamel and BackSide reflector annuli close the crown with rolled overlap into shade-shell
shadeTopologyContract.lowerAperture: intentionally open at shade local Y=-0.275 m

materialImplementationContract.coating: dielectric powder-coat/enamel; exposed hardware uses separate metal materials
materialImplementationContract.bulb: stylized opaque emissive envelope; no glass transmission, IOR, or optical-thickness claim
materialImplementationContract.surfaceFrequencyTargetsBelow: future material-pass authoring targets, not current implementation evidence

continuityContract.policy: same base token, source revision, and seed preserve generation across visual tiers; changed source or seed changes the effective signature

actionReadiness.contract: Stable serial pivots, parent-local sockets, destruction groups, ConstraintConstructionInput records, and ColliderConstructionInput records remain identical across visual tiers.
authoringRules: Place each pivot at its named mechanical joint.
Keep paired arm links under the same joint owner.
Do not adapt construction inputs inside the asset factory.

destructionPolicy.debrisStrategy: Detach authored assemblies before solver-owned fragment generation.

materialPass.acceptedLimitation: No source image or reference-derived PBR evidence exists.

visualAcceptance.scoringRule: AI vision reviews authored visual contracts; no reference-image similarity claim is possible.

featureReviewPolicy.selectionRule: Review object-specific authored systems from named cameras.

screenshotPolicy.minimumEvidence: Named PNG, renderer/backend record, camera, mode, tier, seed, AI-vision scores, and notes.
screenshotPolicy.reviewPairRule: No reference pair exists; compare named views to authored feature contracts.
screenshotPolicy.acceptanceAuthority: AI-vision review record plus technical evidence.

sculptPipeline.blockedReason: Awaiting first native-WebGPU authored-contract capture and AI-vision review.

coordinateFrame.scaleReference: Conservative authored envelope is 0.915 x 0.94 x 0.56 metres over declared tiers, uint32 seed witnesses, and authored motion witnesses

silhouette.boundingShape: 0.915 x 0.94 x 0.56 metre conservative articulated product envelope
silhouette.symmetry: Base and shade are rotational; paired rails mirror across local Z; articulated chain is offset and asymmetric.

observations: Weighted circular base and offset yaw post define the support and serial-chain origin.
Yaw, shoulder, elbow, and shade pivots own local hinge axes, limits, and sockets.
Each arm stage has paired structural rails plus a cable and tension spring.
Powder-coated shade, warm reflector, brass socket, and emissive bulb are separate zones.
Four authored rotation channels animate deterministically and reset to seed-bounded rest transforms.

componentTree.name: Capped solid shade neck
localFeatures: actual indexed capped CylinderGeometry from [0,-0.015,0] to [0,-0.075,0] metres
visual and proxy endpoint disks included

componentTree.name: Bell shade shell
localFeatures: crown closed by paired shade-crown-annulus and shade-crown-inner-annulus faces

componentTree.name: Underside reflector crown annulus
localFeatures: BackSide reflector face visible upward through the open lower aperture
coincident topology with the exterior crown annulus

materials.name: Deep blue-green powder coat
localOverrides: lighter worn hinge and shade edges

roughness.map: future surface target; current factory uses flat scalar response

repetitionSystems.distribution: Two rails per lower/upper arm stage at local Z offsets ±0.031 metres.
Barrel and paired washer hardware at shoulder, elbow, and shade hinges.
Full tier uses eight radial fasteners, budgeted four, minimum zero; protected head identity is unchanged.

buildPasses.goal: Prove base, serial chain, and bell-head silhouette.
Prove pivots, sockets, paired links, springs, cables, and construction inputs.
Refine arm spacing, hinge hardware, springs, and shade flare.
acceptance: Profile and attachment captures preserve mechanical continuity.

buildPasses.goal: Separate powder coat, metal hardware, rubber, reflector, and bulb.
acceptance: Close-material capture preserves all physical-response zones.

buildPasses.goal: Add scale-aware coating, brushing, patina, rubber, and optional opaque bulb-envelope response without a glass-transmission claim.
acceptance: Grazing light reveals bounded response without texture swimming.

buildPasses.goal: Establish neutral product and warm-bulb readability.
acceptance: Key, fill, rim, ACES exposure, bulb emission, and contact shadow are recorded.

buildPasses.goal: Prove four-channel diagnostic articulation and exact reset.
acceptance: Fixed-time captures differ and reset returns exact seed-bounded rest transforms.

buildPasses.goal: Prove monotonic tessellation reduction and identity preservation.
acceptance: Geometry decreases by tier and protected IDs remain exact.

lodPlan.strategy: 32-sided shells, detailed hinge hardware, high-segment springs, and eight shade fasteners; source metrics are 46 render items, 7,519 stored vertices, 8,528 triangles, and 13 shadow casters.
20-sided shells, reduced springs, and four shade fasteners while preserving all action identities; source metrics are 42 render items, 4,367 stored vertices, 4,408 triangles, and 13 shadow casters.

12-sided shells, four-sided rails, short springs, and no shade fasteners; preserve silhouette and protected IDs; source metrics are 38 render items, 2,308 stored vertices, 1,964 triangles, and 13 shadow casters.

performanceBudget.optimizationPolicy: No sustained-performance claim passes without named-device CPU/GPU/presentation evidence. Preserve one scene render and no post-processing passes.

lightingFromPhoto: No source photo exists; use neutral key, soft fill, and restrained rim light for authored product inspection.
Use explicit ACES tone mapping, recorded exposure, and one output transform; keep bulb emission in-scene without bloom.
Use a receiving plane for contact shadow; do not add a post-processing pipeline.
proceduralStrategy: Build the weighted base, hinge hardware, paired rails, shade, reflector, and bulb from deterministic primitives.
Nest yaw, shoulder, elbow, and shade pivots at mechanical joints and attach named sockets in parent-local metres.
Build tension springs as deterministic helix tubes and cables as attached low-radial tubes.
Drive four authored diagnostic rotation channels with exact reset and no solver claim.
Publish ColliderConstructionInput and ConstraintConstructionInput records only; the solver handoff remains blocked.
Reduce radial, spring, and fastener geometry by tier while preserving all protected identities.
Render native WebGPU NodeMaterials in one scene render with no post-processing passes.
risks: No external reference image exists, so reconstruction fidelity cannot be evaluated.
Serial-joint readability and materials require future native-WebGPU browser inspection.
ColliderConstructionInput and ConstraintConstructionInput records are not canonical solver authority.
